//: VS Code attached container configuration for the Kubernetes attach workflow.
1. In VS Code, install the 'Dev Containers' and 'Kubernetes' extensions.
2. Connect kubectl to the AKS cluster.
3. Set kubectl to the workspace namespace so the Dev Containers extension can discover the pod:
4. Open the Command Palette (F1) and run:
'Dev Containers: Attach to Running Kubernetes Container...'
OR expand the Kubernetes explorer, right-click your pod, and choose
5. VS Code Server installs itself inside the pod automatically — no
code-server or tunnel required for this workflow.
6. To persist this config, copy it to:
Note: attached container configs do NOT support the full devcontainer.json spec.
